bregman_next_steps.certified_executable_bundle_reason: dominant stage=validate_simplex: groups are structurally INCOMPLETE (exhaustive=False / not a provable complete set) — buying a partial set is not a guaranteed hedge, so it is correctly NOT certified (completeness is never fabricated); NOTE: 106 group(s) had POSITIVE raw projected profit (best=0.999) but were still rejected (realism=10, validate_simplex=96) — the raw mispricing is real, but the set is not a certifiable complete hedge
